case_title: THAKOR, BALWANTSINH D vs. CHIN, NORMAN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE 134220, THAKOR VS. CHIN, JURY TRIAL SETTLED. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED TO 11-15-96, IN DEPT 7 AT 9AM, FOR CONFIRMATION OF SETTLEMENT.
